name: Herb-Tomato Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat grill to medium heat.
2. Combine salt and black pepper with chopped herbs in a small bowl.
3. Rub mixture onto chicken pieces, ensuring even coating.
4. Place chicken on the hot part of the grill.
5. Cook for 6-8 minutes per side or until internal temperature reaches 165°F (74°C).
6. Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
